since_last: 51% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.12%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.42% · Gold +1.33% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 48% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.12%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.12%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +7.09%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +7.09%, AMAT +6.97%, MU +6.24%, LRCX +5.91%, MRVL +5.82%. Laggards: CRM -4.89%, NOW -4.43%, IBM -4.35%, WDAY -3.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.79% at $150.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
